messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: propose-onboarding-contract commit step fails on ignored .swarmforge/, missing git identity, and never commits after a partial failure
How it works: The contract commits even when the target ignores .swarmforge/ (force-add the exact contract paths)
